test: NB15 — UC Davis per-patient profile + cocktail draft (Pillar 5 opener)
narrative: 23 UC Davis CD patients × per-patient profile (ecotype + calprotectin + Montreal + medication + Tier-A pathobiont presence). E0=7, E1=9, E3=6, mixed=1 (patient 6967), nan=0. Mean 4.4 actionable Tier-A targets per patient. Per-patient cocktail draft composition stratified by ecotype-specific module (NB06 H2d) + phage-availability tier (NB12-NB14) + bile-acid coupling cost (NB09c).
